title: PraxecRepoManifest
description: Per-repo manifest declaring namespace + layout for a praxec resource repo. Loaded from <repo-root>/praxec.repo.yaml when the gateway config references the repo via a `repos:` entry. Every definitionId discovered under the layout directories is namespace-prefixed (`<namespace>/<id>`) before being merged into the top-level gateway registry. See docs/architecture/capability-orchestrator.md §9.

schema.description: Manifest schema identifier. Currently exactly `praxec.repo/v1`; new schema versions will use new constant values so loaders can refuse forward-incompatible manifests at load time.

name.description: Human-readable repo identifier. Lowercase kebab. Distinct from `namespace`; used for diagnostics and `gateway.describe` listings.

namespace.description: The prefix praxec uses to disambiguate this repo's definitionIds from other repos. Lowercase kebab, no `/` (a single segment). Two repos declaring the same namespace fail at config-load.

version.description: Repo version, semver-shaped by convention (not strictly enforced at v1). Surfaced via `gateway.describe`.

description.description: Free-form prose describing what the repo ships.

layout.description: Per-tier directory locations. All keys are optional; defaults match the directory names exactly.
